The '''AP-2 attack droid''' (Assault Platform-2) was a [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] used by the [[Imperial Remnant]]. The droid was armed with a pair of repeating [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] situated on a head turret, two [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifles]], and a [[Grenade launcher/Legends|grenade launcher]] installed in each arm.<ref name="Cadinth" />

The attack droid saw combat during the [[Battle of Cadinth]].<ref name="Cadinth" />

==Behind the scenes==
The "Imperial Attack Droid A" model was designed for the abandoned ''[[The Epic Continues]]'' story line. The prototype model was made by kitbashing the legs and arms of a [[2-1B/Legends|2-1B]] figure, and [[IG-88B/Legends|IG-88's]] torso.<ref name="Droid A">{{WebCite|url=http://theswca.com/index.php?action=disp_item&item_id=50969|text=1985-86 Line Extension Presentation Binder Page 14 - Imperial Attack Droid A|work=The Star Wars Collectors Archive|archivedate=20161118020553}}</ref> It later appeared in the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] continuity where it was officially named the AP-2 attack droid.<ref name="Cadinth" />
